title: Can't build 12.0 for Fedora GNU/Linux
body:
I am try build 12.0 for Fedora Linux and have this error:
```
pform_package.cc: In function 'void pform_end_package_declaration(const vlltype&)':
pform_package.cc:65:20: error: format not a string literal and no format arguments [-Werror=format-security]
   65 |             VLerror(loc, msg.str().c_str());
      |             ~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
How to fix it?
code_blocks:
pform_package.cc: In function 'void pform_end_package_declaration(const vlltype&)':
pform_package.cc:65:20: error: format not a string literal and no format arguments [-Werror=format-security]
   65 |             VLerror(loc, msg.str().c_str());
      |             ~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
